metadata.name: Traefik IngressRoute
metadata.description: Traefik IngressRoute CRD for HTTP/HTTPS routing with advanced features like middleware chains, weighted round-robin, and header-based routing.
metadata.guide:
## Overview
Traefik IngressRoute CRD for HTTP/HTTPS routing with advanced features like middleware chains, weighted round-robin, and header-based routing.

## How to Use
This template renders `main.yaml` as a file.

1. Start with the resource name, namespace, and any required networking or storage settings.
2. Fill in required fields first, then enable optional sections such as TLS, annotations, or extra selectors only when they match your cluster setup.
3. Render the manifest and apply it to the target cluster after confirming the generated resource matches your platform conventions.

## Variable Guide
### General
- `resource_name`: Resource Name; optional; default: app-ingressroute.
- `namespace`: Namespace; optional; default: default.
- `traefik_entrypoint`: Traefik entrypoint for HTTP (e.g., web); optional; default: web.
- `traefik_tls_entrypoint`: Traefik entrypoint for HTTPS (e.g., websecure); optional; default: websecure.
- `traefik_service_name`: Kubernetes service name to route traffic to; optional.
- `traefik_service_port`: Kubernetes service port; optional; default: 80.

### Resource Limits
- `resources_enabled`: Enable resource limits and requests; optional; default: false.
- `resources_cpu_limit`: CPU limit; optional; default: 100m.
- `resources_cpu_request`: CPU request; optional; default: 50m.
- `resources_memory_limit`: Memory limit; optional; default: 128Mi.
- `resources_memory_request`: Memory request; optional; default: 64Mi.

### Traefik Configuration
- `traefik_enabled`: Enable Traefik integration; optional; default: true.
- `traefik_host`: Domain name for the IngressRoute; optional.
- `traefik_domain`: Traefik domain; optional.
- `traefik_tls_enabled`: Enable TLS; optional; default: true.
- `traefik_tls_certresolver`: TLS certificate resolver; optional; default: letsencrypt-prod.

## References
- [Traefik Kubernetes CRD](https://doc.traefik.io/traefik/routing/providers/kubernetes-crd/)
- [Traefik](https://traefik.io)
## Pre-Requisites
- Traefik installed as the Ingress controller
